# The Potter's Mud Room

> Free pottery tracking app built by a potter, for potters. Track every piece, glaze, clay body, and firing — from wet clay to finished work.

## What It Does

The Potter's Mud Room (also known as Potters Mudroom) solves the #1 problem for potters: "Which clay and glaze did I use on that piece?" It's a digital pottery journal and studio organizer.

## Features

- **Piece Tracking**: Log every piece with clay body, glazes, technique, photos at each stage, and notes
- **Glaze Library**: Track commercial glazes and custom recipes with brand, SKU, ingredients, and result photos
- **Clay Bodies**: Log clay types — wet/fired colors, shrinkage %, cone range, cost per bag
- **Firing Logs**: Record every firing — type, cone, atmosphere, kiln, speed, holds. Link to pieces
- **Potter Community**: Forum to share work, ask questions, post glaze results, connect with ceramicists
- **Sales Tracking**: Log sales by venue, track revenue, export CSV for taxes
- **Casualty Tracking**: Log failures (cracking, crawling, warping) and lessons learned

## Pricing

- **Free**: $0 forever — 10 pieces, 1 photo per piece, clay & glaze library, browse the forum
- **Starter**: $3.48/mo (50% founding member discount) — unlimited pieces, 3 photos per piece, firing logs, glaze recipes, sales tracking, full forum access

## Who It's For

- Wheel throwers
- Hand builders
- Ceramic students
- Studio potters
- Anyone who wants to stop guessing and start tracking their pottery

## Created By

Christina Workman — a lifelong ceramicist who specializes in small plates and bowls. She built this app to solve her own problem of forgetting which clay and glaze was used on each piece.
